Haiyuan MicroGrid Technology Co., Ltd. — Internal Compliance Memo — 2025-06-30 — CN PIPL/CSL/DSL and Securities Law treatment for SSE private placement pre-disclosure.
The issuer is circulating a board pre-read; content constitutes “内幕信息” under the 证券法 until CSRC registration acceptance and SSE公告; trading blackout remains in effect.
Company 统一社会信用代码 (USCC): 9 1 3 1 0 5 0 0 M A 9 X 7 Q 3 1 D (Haiyuan MicroGrid); custody and sponsor workstreams are tracked under HY-SSE-PP program.
Ms. Lin Xiaomei (林晓美), Sr. IR Manager (Pudong, Shanghai), lin.xm@haiyuan-microgrid.cn; internal account lxm-ir; device MateBook 14 SN HB-MB14-LXM-7f2a; VPN sso line 21-48 from 10.23.6.77 at 19:12; WeCom ext 8821.
居民身份证(截取) 420105 19910712 14X; DOB 1991-07-12; office badge HY-IR-031; office: 18F, Tower C, 688 Gaolan Rd.; these are quasi-identifiers under PIPL and require minimization/redaction in circulation.
HR/employment workflows use vendor “Yuecheng HR Cloud Ltd.” (fictional) for onboarding and payroll; logs sync to HK/SIN environments; 数据出境安全评估 (CAC) will be initiated before any production transfer; no cross-border movement has occurred.
Draft financial KPIs (未披露): Q2 unaudited revenue RMB 318m; GM 21.4%; capex 46m; share issuance range 36–44m; treat as MNPI and limit to board/sponsor under clean-team protocol.
This is not a MAC address example: ab:cd:ef:00:00:00 (documentation only); likewise, “a 29-year-old analyst in Nansha” is generic demographic text and not identifiable on its own.
Link reference (internal): https://sec.haiyuan.cn/case/U A T /2025/06?user=lxm-hr&doc=mnpi-draft-v4; case no. HY-SSE-PP-2025-06; ocr artifact: l x m - h r appears in older scans.
Separate, non-identifying set for policy illustration: 1980-11-05, Chengdu, engineer, laptop “SunRay Q2”, crm account “guest88” — no named person; cites public CSRC FAQs which are permissible references.
Board packet addresses CSL critical information infrastructure scoping, DSL data catalog v2.1, and PIPL Art. 28 minors (<14) protections; no minors’ data exist in current staff datasets.
Subsidiary (fictional) Jinhai Storage Systems Co., Ltd. — 统一社会信用代码: 9 2 2 2 0 0 0 0 M A 1 K 8 3 L 0 R; registered Nansha; used solely for intra-group logistics billing.
Do not upload working papers to open repositories; product names CloudBridge Pro and SkyLedger are generic; project mgmt: todo finalize DPIA, update RBAC matrix, vendor SCC addendum.
Contact: Mr. Zhao Ren (赵仁), Compliance Director, zhao.ren@haiyuan-microgrid.cn, +86-21-5600-1120 ext 603; CAC issues cc: compliance@haiyuan-microgrid.cn.
Trading window opens only after SSE D-1 bulletin; until then all employees, including Ms. Lin, remain restricted; sponsor “Bolang Sponsor Securities” (fictional) monitors DingTalk channels; export to EU-West mirror is disabled.
Device note: “haiyuan-5G” is an SSID and not unique by itself; printer HY-PRT-7B shows job 00 19 44 from lxm-ir; meeting minutes are saved under \\share\IR\2025\06\pre-read (internal only).
